title: centaurium capitatum
intro: Centaurium capitatum, also known as grass-of-paradise, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its bitter compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurium capitatum include its ability to aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal disorders, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its potential to support the immune system. Centaurium capitatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
